# Nudge CRM
The minimalist, industrial-grade CRM for solo freelancers.

## Core Value Proposition
Nudge CRM is built for freelancers who hate the complexity of enterprise CRMs. It provides a high-performance, minimalist interface (Nothing-inspired) to manage clients, track project notes, and automate follow-up reminders.

## Key Features
- **Client Management**: A streamlined directory to track all your freelance contacts.
- **Activity Logs**: Chronological logs for every client interaction.
- **Smart Reminders**: Automated email follow-ups via QStash and Resend.
- **Professional Invoicing**: Industrial-grade invoice generation and management.
- **Security**: Built on Google Firebase with industry-standard encryption.

## Pricing
- **Free Tier**: Up to 10 clients, basic note-taking.
- **Pro Tier ($9/mo)**: Unlimited clients, automated email reminders, full activity history.

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI.
- **Backend**: Firebase Firestore, Firebase Auth, Firebase Admin SDK.
- **Infrastructure**: Vercel, Upstash (QStash), Resend, Lemon Squeezy (Payments).

## Target Audience
Solo freelancers, independent consultants, and creative professionals who need a fast, zero-friction tool to manage their business.
